title: One LNG tanker passes Hormuz after US-Iran agree to deal, shippers stay cautious

snapshot.title: One LNG tanker passes Hormuz after US-Iran agree to deal, shippers stay cautious
snapshot.description: India’s Petronet sent a liquefied natural gas tanker through the Strait of Hormuz, the only shipment on Monday since the United States and Iran reached a peace deal to reopen the strategic waterway, shiptracking data showed. The limited traffic underscores wariness among shippers who have welcomed the deal but are still waiting for more details — including mine clearance in
snapshot.author: Reuters
snapshot.pageTitle: One LNG tanker passes Hormuz after US-Iran agree to deal, shippers stay cautious | Arab News
